The official full Shades EQ Gloss shade chart PDF (redken-2024-shades-eq-shade-chart.pdf) exists on redkenpro.com but direct fetches returned HTTP 500; the shade-charts hub page renders download buttons without exposing hrefs. Full-portfolio enumeration is currently only covered by the 1001 Blondes subset chart plus a tier-2 distributor chart. Recommend retrying the redkenpro media URL with a browser user agent or pulling charts from the Redken Asset Library.

Wella has moved to an app-first shade chart (Wella Shade Chart app); no current official PDF enumerating every individual Koleston Perfect ME+ shade code with names was located. The usage booklet and technical guides enumerate families and tone codes but not the complete SKU list. The Wellastore US koleston-perfect collection page (us.wella.professionalstore.com/en-US/koleston-perfect) would enumerate US SKUs but the fetch timed out and it remains unverified.

The US line page offers 'Download our Shade Overview (PDF, 8.32MB)' but the direct PDF URL could not be captured from the rendered page. The verified skp.media paper swatch chart enumerates all shade codes but IGORA ROYAL shades generally lack marketing names; the Shade Overview PDF should be captured to confirm the current 143-shade assortment.

The 'IGORA VIBRANCE Service Manual (pdf, 27.84 MB)' download exists on the official tone-on-tone page but its direct URL was not exposed in the text render. The 60+ shade portfolio is partially enumerated via the skp.media paper swatch chart and the SKPUSA conversion booklet; the service manual should be captured for the authoritative full list.

issue_log.details: Direct WebFetch returned HTTP 500 on two attempts (with and without ?rev= query). URL was surfaced by the search engine pointing at the official redkenpro.com media library; recorded as link-confirmed/broken rather than verified content.
SalonCentric (tier-2 fallback) fetch timed out, likely bot protection. Not recorded in source_catalog because the URL and its content could not be verified.

Wellastore US Koleston Perfect collection page fetch timed out; not recorded in source_catalog. The sibling color-touch page on the same domain was successfully read via search extraction, so the store itself is live.

issue_log.item: schwarzkopf-professional.com US pages (IGORA ROYAL, IGORA VIBRANCE tone-on-tone)
issue_log.details: Pages fetched successfully and confirm downloadable PDFs ('Shade Overview', 'Service Manual') exist, but the markdown render did not include the underlying PDF hrefs, so those direct PDF URLs could not be recorded without inventing them.

issue_log.item: Search-extracted PDFs (1001 Blondes chart, Wella usage booklet/leaflet/technical folder, salon-services charts, SKPUSA tentpole booklet, Wella education brochure, Redken 2021 CGL 10-min chart)
issue_log.details: Content for these URLs was read via the search engine's full-text extraction of the exact URL rather than a separate direct fetch; recorded honestly in each source's notes. Items marked 'fetched-and-read' via WebFetch were the Color Gels Lacquers 2020 chart, skp.media IGORA paper swatch chart, Henkel IGORA VIBRANCE IFU, redkenpro shade-charts hub, and both schwarzkopf-professional.com US pages.

salon-services.com is a UK distributor (Sally Beauty group). Its Redken Shades EQ, Koleston Perfect, and Color Touch documents are technically accurate brand documents but may reflect UK assortments; marked tier 2 with cautions.
